by Foster , on Webinar

## Upcoming Webinar: Preparing for H-1B Cap Season and H-1B Updates in 2026
by Foster , on Webinar
This webinar will provide HR professionals with knowledge and updates on H-1B specialty occupation work visas, including the requirements for an H-1B and employer obligations, the new December 23, 2025 rule regarding H-1B cap registrations for the H-1B cap lottery, and the H-1B Proclamation. 📌 Topic: Preparing for H-1B Cap […]
